title: Shri Santoshi Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Santoshi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Santoshi.
description:
Jai Santoshi Mata,
Maiya Jai Santoshi Mata.
Apne sevak jan ko,
Sukh sampatti data॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Sundar, cheer sunhari,
Maa dharan kinho.
Heera panna damke,
Tan shringar linho॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Geru lal chhata chhavi,
Badan kamal sohe.
Mand hansat karunamayi,
Tribhuvan jan mohe॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Swarn sinhasan baithi,
Chanwar dhure pyare.
Dhoop, deep, madhumeva,
Bhog dharein nyare॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Gud aru chana param priya,
Tame santosh kiyo.
Santoshi kehlai,
Bhaktan vaibhav diyo॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Jai Shukravar priya manat,
Aaj divas sohi.
Bhakt mandali chhai,
Katha sunat mohi॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Mandir jagmag jyoti,
Mangal dhwani chhai.
Vinay karein hum balak,
Charanan sir nai॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Bhakti bhavmay puja,
Angikrit kijai.
Jo man base hamare,
Ichha phal dijai॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Dukhi, daridri, rogi,
Sankatmukt kiye.
Bahu dhandhanya bhare ghar,
Sukh saubhagya diye॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Dhyan dharyo jis jan ne,
Manvanchit phal payo.
Puja katha shravan kar,
Ghar anand aayo॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Sharan gahe ki lajja,
Rakhiyo Jagdambe.
Sankat tu hi nivare,
Dayamayi Ambe॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

Santoshi Maa ki aarti,
Jo koi nar gaave.
Riddhi-siddhi sukh sampatti,
Jee bharkar paave॥
॥ Jai Santoshi Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Santoshi Maa's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to seek contentment, happiness, peace, and the fulfillment of one's wishes.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for Santoshi Maa's Puja and Aarti?
faq.a2: Friday is considered the most auspicious and dedicated day for worshipping Maa Santoshi.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Santoshi Maa during Aarti?
faq.a3: Roasted chickpeas (Chana) and Jaggery (Gur) are most preferred; ensure no sour food is offered.
faq.q4: Can Santoshi Maa's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it is very auspicious to perform the Aarti in front of a water-filled Kalash with sincere devotion.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Reciting the 'Santoshi Mata Vrat Katha' and sitting in silence after the Aarti is highly beneficial.
